title: Deep Dark Depths
description: Progressive cave difficulty plugin. Mobs get stronger, loot gets rarer, and environmental hazards increase as you venture deep underground.
body:
### **warning**
This plugin is still at very early stage of alpha. if you find any bugs or anything report to me.for now this will be discontinued for a week.

# 🕳️ Deep Dark Depths
Something is listening.
You shouldn't have dug this deep.

The first thing you lose in the depths is your sense of safety. The second is your sense of direction. The third... is yourself.

Below Y=0, the rules change. The creatures down here abandoned sight long ago. They don't need eyes when they can hear your heartbeat through stone.

## 🔇 Silence Is Survival
Every sound you make is a death sentence.

The scrape of iron against ore. The crunch of gravel beneath your boots. The wheeze of a chest lid opening. They hear it all.

You've spent your whole Minecraft life making noise without consequence. That life is over now.

Sneak. Hold your breath. Pray they didn't notice.

## 📉 The Descent
**Something wrong lives at the bottom of the world**.

| Depth               | What Awaits                                              |
|---------------------|:--------------------------------------------------------:|
| Surface             | Safety. Sunlight. Memory                                 |
| Shallow             | The first whispers. Mobs that turn their heads too slowly|
| Deep                | They're faster now. Stronger. They know you're here.     |
| Abyss               | You shouldn't be here.                                   |

## ☠️ The Caves Fight Back
**The stone itself rejects you**.
- 🪨 Cave-Ins — One swing too many and the ceiling remembers it was never meant to be hollow.
- ☁️ Gas Pockets — Invisible. Odorless. You'll know when your vision blurs and your legs stop working.
- 🌑 The Darkness — Below Y=-48, light becomes a memory. Without a torch, the dark begins to seep in.

Some players report seeing things in the darkness. Movement at the edge of their screen. Shapes that weren't there before.

## 💀 Risk Everything
The depth offers gifts to those who survive long enough to claim them.
Diamonds. Ancient debris. Echo shards that hum with frequencies you can almost hear.
But the deeper you go, the more you have to leave behind. Sound carries further. Mobs spawn angrier. The way back gets longer.

_Is it worth it?_

## 🥷 Learn to Be Nothing
**The masters of the deep move like ghosts:**

- Crouch constantly — 90% quieter
- Use Silk Touch — The ore doesn't scream
- Build with wool — Sound dies in soft places

**Some have made homes in the Abyss. Chambers wrapped in wool, lit by shroomlights, sealed from the horrors outside. They say it's peaceful down there, once you learn to stop making noise.**

_They're lying._

## 🏆 Milestones of Madness
- ⚫ "Into the Depths" — Y=0. The last light fades.
- ⚫ "Deeper Still" — Y=-16. You stop hearing birds.
- ⚫ "The Deep Dark" — Y=-32. Something knows your name.
- ⚫ "Abyss Walker" — Y=-48. You don't remember why you came.
- ⚫ "Rock Bottom" — Y=-60. You found it. Now what?

## ⚙️ Configuration
Every horror can be tuned. Noise levels. Hazard chances. Mob scaling. 
**config.yml**
 lets you control how cruel the depths become.

_Or how merciful_.

## 📦 Requirements
- Paper 1.21.8+
- Java 21
- A tolerance for tension
# 
  
 **_The surface will always be there.
 The sunlight will wait for you.
 But you won't go back, will you?
 They can hear you reading this._**
